deep.translate: глубокий, глубинный, низкий, глубоко, вглубь, глубина, глубь, бездна, море
mnemonic:
deep [di:p]
***
ГЛУБОКУЮ яму вырыл тот тип. (это) deep
***
В яму глубокую "deep"
упала овца "sheep".

examples.eng: He has a deep voice.
He's in a deep droop.
She drew a deep breath.
The dog dug a deep hole.
The well was forty feet deep.
I am deep in debt.
Deep grief masters me.
She fell into a deep sleep.
Deep down, she is a caring person.
examples.ru: В глубине души она заботливый человек.

examples.eng: She is in a deep study.
The wardrobe was very deep.
Gold is mined from deep under ground.
examples.ru: Золото добывается из глубины земных недр.

examples.eng: He dug his hands deep into his pockets.
examples.ru: Он засунул руки глубоко в карманы.

examples.eng: Barton's deep, rough voice
Dig a hole three feet deep.
We walked in the deep snow.
That's too deep for me.
Beauty is only skin deep.
examples.ru: Красота обманчива. / С лица воду не пить. / Красота не глубже кожи.

examples.eng: She fell into deep slumber.
The wound left a deep scar.
He sank into deep melancholy.
May I express my deepest sympathy.
She spoke in a deep mannish voice.
Elaine felt a pain deep within her.
Trees struck roots deep into the soil.
examples.ru: Деревья пускают корни глубоко в почву.

examples.eng: The three men sat up deep into the night.
Sara took a deep breath.
The water was waist-deep.
a deep fissure in the ice
I love that deep bass line.
